candidates.title: Modern Casual Dress Logo
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: My new casual-dress label needs a crisp, modern logo that captures an easy-going yet stylish vibe. Style • Overall look: clean, contemporary lines with just enough personality to feel approachable rather than high-fashion formal. • Colour choices are open, though a palette that feels fresh and wearable (think muted pastels or a single bold accent) will probably suit the brand best. Feel free to propose options. Concept guidance A subtle dress silhouette, smart negative space, or expressive lettering could all work—as long as the result remains unmistakably modern and instantly readable at small sizes (web favicons, garment labels, swing tags). I’m flexible on icon vs. typography so long as the final mark feels balanced and scales well. Deliverables 1. Primary logo in fully editable vector format (.ai or .eps) 2. High-resolution transparent PNG (RGB) 3. One-colour and reverse variants 4.

candidates.title: Luxury E-commerce Brand Visuals
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m creating a high-end brand that unites graphic design, videography, photography and a streamlined e-commerce website. The entire identity must feel unmistakably premium: think a deep black canvas paired with crisp white typography, minimal ornamentation, and a confident, modern layout. Logo & Core Identity The logo has to rely purely on typography—no symbols, icons or complex marks. Clean letterforms, balanced kerning and a subtle nod to luxury brands such as Saint Laurent or Balenciaga are key. Alongside the primary lock-up, I’ll need a monochrome palette, font recommendations and usage rules so every asset—from product packaging to video title cards—stays consistent. E-commerce Experience The site’s main job is selling. It should showcase products elegantly while highlighting verified customer reviews (this is the one essential feature I specified). candidates.title: Modern Minimalistic Fashion Logo Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I run a fashion-focused brand and I’m ready to elevate its visual identity with a fresh, modern logo. I’m drawn to a clean, minimalistic aesthetic in a monochrome palette—think sleek lines, elegant negative space, and no unnecessary embellishments. The design must be 100 % original and evoke both style and confidence while remaining instantly recognisable at any size, from clothing labels to large storefront signage. Please develop at least two distinct concept directions so I can choose the one that best captures my brand personality. Once a concept is approved, refine it through a few rounds of feedback to nail down every detail. candidates.title: Luxury Perfume E-Commerce Website
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I need a web designer and developer to create a luxury e-commerce website for Luxeris, a premium fragrance brand. The visual identity, logo and packaging concepts are already defined, and we are looking for a modern, high-converting website that reflects elegance, exclusivity and sophistication. Scope: • Design and develop a premium homepage with refined typography, clean layouts and smooth animations. • Build a complete online store optimized for desktop and mobile devices. • Create a seamless customer journey from product discovery to checkout. Required features: • Product reviews. • Advanced filtering system. • Gift options and premium wrapping. • Secure online payments. • Order tracking. • Discount code functionality. • User accounts and wishlist. • Email newsletter integration. candidates.title: Shopify Wellness Site Redesign
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I need a seasoned Shopify designer-developer to give our wellness beverage store a complete visual and structural refresh. The current build works, but the product pages feel flat and uninspiring, so that is where I want the most dramatic leap forward—bolder imagery, richer descriptions, and an overall layout that immediately communicates premium health benefits and drives add-to-cart. Here is the scope I have in mind: • Re-imagine the branding presentation while staying true to our existing logo, colours, and type where they still serve us. • Craft six new product pages for our functional drink range and probiotic shots, each one mobile-first, conversion-focused, and visually consistent with the updated style. • Optimise every page for speed, responsiveness, SEO enhancement, and modern UX best practices. • Improve navigation flow and on-page storytelling so visitors instantly understand

candidates.title: Catchy Water Bottle Label Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I need a fresh set of water-bottle labels that feel playful and instantly catch the eye of brewery and restaurant patrons. The look we’re after is colorful, bright, and bold— nothing muted or vintage—so please lean into lively palettes, dynamic shapes, and fun typography. The label must keep our brand logo and the product name front and center; everything else can be treated as supportive design elements. I’ll supply logo files, dielines, and a short creative brief the moment we kick off. From there, I’d like to collaborate through two or three quick review rounds to make sure the artwork reflects the quirky, upbeat personality we’ve established for our clients. Deliverables • Two initial concepts presented as flat mock-ups • One final print-ready file (AI or layered PSD + PDF) sized to the provided dieline • All linked fonts and graphics in an organized package I work in Adobe Illustrat
